name: Modern Workplace & Collaboration
description: Digital workplace solutions built around Microsoft 365, Teams, and related collaboration platforms. Includes deployment, adoption and change management, meeting room technology, and endpoint management (Intune/Autopilot). Enables hybrid work through unified communication and productivity tooling.
target_audience: HR, IT workplace teams, CIOs driving hybrid work
differentiators: Microsoft Gold/Solutions Partner for Modern Work
End-to-end from hardware (meeting rooms) to software (M365) to adoption
Change management and user training included
